chunks.text: What is the oldest tree in the world?
Many people think of a great oak.
But there is an ancient tree far older than any oak.
High in the mountains of California
a bristlecone pine has been surviving for over four thousand years.
It is one of the oldest living trees on the earth.
Compared with other pines, it may add only a few millimeters each year.
In the high mountains, the air is thin, the wind is cold
Yet such a harsh environment is what has grown the long life of this tree.
Scientists measure the age of these trees from the rings within the bark.
One has been found to be four thousand eight hundred fifty five years old.
We cannot help admiring a tree that is older than our history.
It is among the most remarkable beings, carrying silence and strength together.
